title: Parsing Bug: syntax error, unexpected TYPE-IDENTIFIER
body:
- command

verilator -cc -trace -exe top_module.cpp -F hdl_file_list_copy.txt --top-module DataPath_SL

- error message

%Error: /media/hogege/disk1_8TB/workspace/ElectronNest-Verilator/src_hdl/RALU/DataPath_SL.sv:210:13: syntax error, unexpected TYPE-IDENTIFIER
  210 |  ShiftLogic ShiftLogic
      |             ^~~~~~~~~~
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)

- DataPath_SL.sv

module DataPath_SL
	import	pkg_en::*;
	import	pkg_alu::*;
	import	pkg_extend_index::*;
#(
	parameter UNIT_TYPE			= 0,
	parameter WIDTH_OPCODE			= 8,
	parameter WIDTH_CONSTANT		= 8,
	parameter WIDTH_DATA			= 32,
	parameter ExtdConfig			= 0
)(...);
...
	ShiftLogic ShiftLogic
	(/*brank*/
	);
...
endmodule

- ShiftLogicUnit.sv

module ShiftLogic
	import	pkg_en::*;
	import	pkg_alu::*;
(...);
...
endmodule

- hdl_file_list_copy.txt

/media/hogege/disk1_8TB/workspace/ElectronNest-Verilator/src_hdl/Packages/pkg_alu.sv
/media/hogege/disk1_8TB/workspace/ElectronNest-Verilator/src_hdl/Packages/pkg_extend_index.sv

/media/hogege/disk1_8TB/workspace/ElectronNest-Verilator/src_hdl/Packages/pkg_bram_if.sv
/media/hogege/disk1_8TB/workspace/ElectronNest-Verilator/src_hdl/Packages/pkg_link.sv
/media/hogege/disk1_8TB/workspace/ElectronNest-Verilator/src_hdl/Packages/pkg_mem.sv
/media/hogege/disk1_8TB/workspace/ElectronNest-Verilator/src_hdl/IComp/SkipInit.sv
/media/hogege/disk1_8TB/workspace/ElectronNest-Verilator/src_hdl/IComp/SyncUnit.sv
/media/hogege/disk1_8TB/workspace/ElectronNest-Verilator/src_hdl/RALU/DataPath_SL.sv
/media/hogege/disk1_8TB/workspace/ElectronNest-Verilator/src_hdl/RALU/ShiftLogicUnit.sv

- verilator --version

Verilator 4.038 2020-07-11 rev v4.036-114-g0cd4a57ad

- OS and distribution

Linux, Ubuntu 22.04.2

- May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
Please
